title: Noise Remover
shortDescription: Clean speech and music offline with A/B preview, smart presets, batch export, and WAV, MP3, or FLAC output.
description:
Noise Remover helps you clean audio files offline with a simple, focused workflow.
Remove background noise from voice recordings, interviews, podcasts, lectures, music samples, and older audio files without requiring an internet connection.
Select a noise-only part of the waveform, preview the original and cleaned audio with the built-in A/B player, then export the improved result in WAV, MP3, or FLAC.
The app includes Speech and Music modes, smart cleanup presets, Noise Gate, 50/60 Hz Hum Removal, De-click/De-pop, output peak normalization, batch export, and a cleanup quality report for better control over your final audio.
Designed for privacy, simplicity, and reliable offline use.
features: 🎧 Offline noise removal for cleaner audio
🗣️ Speech mode for voice notes, calls, lectures, and podcasts
🎵 Music mode for songs and instrumental recordings
✨ A/B Preview to compare Original vs. Clean before exporting
🎛️ Smart Cleanup Presets for faster, easier processing
⚡ Fast local processing with no internet required
💾 Export cleaned audio as WAV, MP3, or FLAC
🔊 Output Peak Normalization for more consistent audio levels
📦 Batch Export to clean multiple files with the same settings
🧹 Advanced tools: Noise Gate, Hum Removal, and De-click/De-pop
📄 Cleanup Quality Report with processing details and settings used
Clean multiple audio files with the same settings and export them faster.
benefits: Improve media quality with purpose-built controls
Produce polished output with a simpler workflow
Built around offline noise removal for cleaner audio
Built around speech mode for voice notes, calls, lectures, and podcasts
Built around music mode for songs and instrumental recordings
extractedFrom: Microsoft Store publisher search and product detail APIs
